features: L'Oreal Men Expert Thermic Resist Deodorant Spray
description: Product Description Description: Intense activities, high temperatures, stressful situations? The Men Expert Thermic Resist Antiperspirants with efficient Ceramic System technology even at 45°C offer you the solution to stay cool and withstand even the most intense situations. 48-hour sweat effect, 72 hours odour-inhibiting effect and long-lasting fresh fragrance. Ingredients 882460 04 - Ingredients: Isobutane, Aqua/Water, Dimethicone, Aluminium Chlorohyddrate, Fragrance/Fragrance, Disteradimonium, Perlite, Tokopherol • Dimethie Conol • Lauryl PEG-9 Polydimethyl Dimethyl Dimethyl Siloxyethyone • Citral • Cirron. Cumarin • geraniol • limonene • linalol • phoenoxyethanol (F.I.L. Z70020498/1) Notes: Shake well before each use and spray 15 cm away from the armpits. If blocked, rinse the diffuser with lukewarm water. See More Directions Shake well before each use and spray 15 cm from the armpits. In case of a stopper, rinse the diffuser with warm water.
